description_long: This object is a long-barreled shotgun with a classic design, featuring a wooden full stock and a metallic receiver. The barrel is slender and extends significantly from the receiver, with a front sight bead visible at the muzzle. The receiver area is robust and dark, contrasting with the reddish-brown wood of the stock and fore-end. A prominent lever is located beneath the receiver, indicating a lever-action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger and lever. The overall finish is a mix of matte and smooth surfaces, with metallic and wooden textures clearly distinguishable.
description: A long, lever-action shotgun with a wooden full stock, metallic barrel, and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and lever beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the full stock, barrel, and lever-action mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the end of the stock and the slim profile of the shotgun's length.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
